prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别约39955→33263→55813→38168→36982名，整体波动较大，2023年出现明显后移（55813名），2024–2025年逐步回升至约37000名附近；2025年基准位次约36982名；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年均为27人，2026年计划大幅扩招至41人，扩幅约52%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第198位持续上升至2026年第157位，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认知度有所增强；该校在声誉舆情文件中未见明显负面或正面事件；抖音热度排名第79位，评价为“一般”，整体曝光度中等偏低；历史投档异常记录中未出现延边大学相关信号，报考心理较为平稳；延边大学在第五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，整体学科实力以B类为主，缺乏顶尖学科支撑；招生专业以工科、医学、管理类为主。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏热；临床医学、药学类专业热度稳定偏推荐；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增长约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；延边大学位于吉林省延边州，距陕西较远，属于跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约36982名、2026年大幅扩招至41人（扩幅52%）以及陕西省物理类考生增长约19.7%等多重因素：扩招使位次数字显著增大（更难进）；同时考生规模大幅增长进一步推高竞争，软科排名持续上升也增强了学校吸引力。预测2026年最低位次约48787名，区间48287–49287名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 39955 → 33263 → 55813 → 38168 → 36982, showing significant fluctuations, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (55813) and a gradual recovery to around 37000 in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 36982; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 27 students each year from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 it will significantly expand to 41 students, an increase of about 52%, substantially increasing the number of admissions and having a major impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 198th in 2021 to 157th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition; no significant negative or positive events were found in the reputation and public opinion files; its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with overall exposure moderately low; no signals related to Yanbian University appeared in historical admission anomaly records, indicating relatively stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Yanbian University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, lacking top-tier disciplines; the admission majors are mainly engineering, medicine, and management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and computer science continue to be socially popular; clinical medicine and pharmacy majors have stable and recommended popularity; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Shaanxi, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of about 36982 in 2025, the significant expansion to 41 students in 2026 (52% increase), and the 19.7% growth in Shaanxi physics category examinees: the expansion makes the ranking number significantly larger (harder to enter); at the same time, the substantial increase in candidate numbers further intensifies competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings also enhances the university's appeal. The predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 48787, with a range of 48287–49287.

- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Food Science and Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Tourism Management
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 48287–49287, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 3 majors as safety options, and aim for Tier 1 majors as reach targets. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<48287), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>49287), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
